UG-45  NOZZLE NECK DIMENSIONS AND FINISH. (a) The inside diameter of nozzle necks shall be sufficient to accommodate the intended piping connection and shall be finished to the tolerances specified herein. (b) Nozzle projection beyond the vessel wall shall not exceed the limits used in the reinforcement calculation of UG-37 and UG-40. (c) The nozzle neck thickness shall meet the requirements of UG-44. Nozzle attachment welds shall comply with UW-49. For openings in general, see UG-36. Inspection of nozzle welds shall be performed as required by UW-11. Refer to UG-46 for access and inspection opening provisions.
